arts.ttl: Liverpool forced to delay title party as best and worst of careless Arsenal on show
arts.sum: ARSENAL 2-2 CRYSTAL PALACE: Mikel Arteta's side did just enough to ensure the Premier League title race is not officially over quite yet - but Liverpool's coronation looks imminent

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher makes David Raya point after Jean-Philippe Mateta goal vs Arsenal
arts.sum: Former Liverpool defender Jamie Carragher has outlined how Arsenal goalkeeper David Raya could have avoided Crystal Palace’s equalising goal in Wednesday night’s 2-2 draw at the Emirates Stadium . But as soon as Odegaard almost takes up that position there as another centre-back and then Kiwior becomes your left-back, I think you’ve got to get back in goal.”

arts.ttl: Arsenal 'convinced' Mikel Arteta transfer target will join in summer ahead of Real Madrid
arts.sum: Arsenal are reportedly confident that one of their main summer transfer targets will join the club instead of Real Madrid to play for Mikel Arteta.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher reveals why Mikel Arteta will be FUMING after Arsenal slip up again in the Premier League with Crystal Palace draw
arts.sum: Arsenal's slip up means Arteta's side have drawn three of their last four Premier League and are yet to officially confirm their spot in next season's Champions League.

arts.ttl: Glasner: We’ll go into the weekend with belief, courage & confidence
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner says a big positive of Crystal Palace’s impressive display against Arsenal at the Emirates is the momentum it gives his side heading into this weekend’s FA Cup semi-final at Wembley.

arts.ttl: Oliver Glasner delivers verdict on Crystal Palace’s 2-2 draw at Arsenal ahead of FA Cup semi-final
arts.sum: Eddie Nketiah had a chance to add a second goal minutes later, but a last-ditch block from Kiwior stopped the former Arsenal attacker from scoring. Palace equalised just before the half-hour mark when Adam Wharton’s corner found Eberechi Eze on the edge of the box and the Greenwich-born attacker volleyed the ball into the ground, bouncing off Raya’s post and in.

arts.ttl: Can Kiwior and Trossard deliver for Arsenal ahead of crucial PSG clash?
arts.sum: Ahead of a crucial semifinal tie against PSG in the Champions League, Arsenal will need several players to step it up to avoid the same mistakes.

arts.ttl: Mikel Arteta gives damning verdict on Arsenal's performance in 2-2 draw with Crystal Palace as Liverpool move to within a point of clinching Premier League title
arts.sum: MATT BARLOW AT THE EMIRATES: Arsenal and Palace shared a point apiece ahead of semi-finals in the Champions League and the FA Cup respectively an absorbing contest in north London.

arts.ttl: Arsenal handed Bukayo Saka injury boost ahead of PSG clash
arts.sum: The winger was a concern for the Gunners ahead of the Premier League clash against Crystal Palace at the Emirates Stadium on Wednesday night. The good news for Arsenal is that he was brought on with 30 minutes of the game left to play.

arts.ttl: Glasner: We targeted Raya | Carra: 'Get back in your goal!'
arts.sum: Oliver Glasner revealed Crystal Palace targeted David Raya's high positioning off his line as his team grabbed a 2-2 draw with Arsenal - with Sky Sports' Jamie Carragher critical of the Gunners goalkeeper in the draw.
